Burger Allocator

One replay, one weekly push, one stop-review candidate.

This board reads only state/ideas.json and forces three capped verdict lanes: build now, park, and kill review.

Generated: Apr 14, 2026, 9:54 a.m. Active counts: operate 11ready 26 Lane cap: 3 each Replay candidates: 37

Policy

  • build now favors non-muted build-or-ship lanes, recent updates, repo or deploy receipts, and explicit next steps.
  • park holds active work that still has a credible next action but is not the strongest weekly push.
  • kill review highlights muted, stale, or still-unstarted bets that should re-justify their slot before more effort.

build now

project stage

push harder

ship +600, build +500, mvp +400, spec +300, ready +200, planning +100, operate +0

build now

shipping receipts

push harder

deploy receipt +35, repo receipt +20

build now

freshness and next step

push harder

up to +40 for recent updates, +5 per saved next action, maturity score added directly

build now

mute state

block push

muted project -120 and excluded from build-now lane

park

middle state

hold

anything not strong enough for build now and not weak enough for kill review stays parked

park

saved next action

hold

park keeps cards with a credible next step instead of fabricating urgency

kill review

explicit freeze

stop review

muted project +130 because it already lacks permission to advance

kill review

idle ready bet

stop review

ready-without-project +80 so unstarted cards must defend a restart

kill review

operate drift and age

stop review

operate +25 plus age pressure at 18 points per day

kill review

missing receipts and next step

stop review

missing repo +18, missing deploy +12, weak next-step signal up to +20

Reopen Trigger Audit

The latest operate audit says 8 of 11 live operate lanes still lack an explicit reopen trigger. Keep maintenance quiet until those lanes say exactly what should wake them.

사람이 바로 다시 시작할 생각이 있으면 먼저 project mute를 해제하고, 최근 20편의 제목·썸네일 문구·설명 첫 줄·첫 훅·한 줄 개요·AI disclosure 여부를 한 번에 넣은 입력팩과 새 초안 1편으로 첫 20+1 코칭 카드를 재현한다.
